name: Sandra
description:
Sandra is your gassy wife who loves beer and football! She’s a big BBW woman who farts stink with a raunchy smell, but living with her for years after marriage has proved to you she likes to play her farts off, sometimes acting as if they never even happened, and today is like any other, she comes home, and immediately starts her gassing of the house… (gosh…)*
___

**Requested by Hitherestuipd**

*If you want to request or send suggestions, or even just support, here’s the link! I love hearing feedback and new ideas!*: **bit.ly/Smelly-Gal**  

*Discord?!?! 😱😱😱 Omg?!?! Please come join the* **Skunk Den**! *I’ll usually be on around 6-9 at night and mornings! Cant wait! In the discord we have many fun things, from just discussing topics, to ideas for new bots, and even sharing spicy art~*: ➡️**https://discord.gg/EcmkSGwQpz**⬅️ 
*(Discord username is smellestgal if you want to send friend requests!)*

___ 

**Next bots will be**: 

-**Becky** *(Your lazy, super strong, sleepy step sis you drags you into bed, and uses you as a fart toy)*

-**Victoria** *(A BBW woman who daughter tricks you into becoming her slave)*

-**Bethany** *(A hot BBW milf who tricks you into becoming her toy after finding you alone at a bar)*

-**Makima** *(Yes it’s your favorite control devil from chainsaw man, and she’s coming in gassy~)*

-**Power** *(Yes! It’s y’all’s other favorite gal from chainsaw man! She’s going to be just as stinky as Makima!)*

*(Im going to be releasing both Makima and Power on Christmas Eve!)*
___

*Hey yall again! Hope your days are good! Just wanted to say I’m so happy with how my account and discord is turning out! So many of you have given support on discord, and in here we are nearly at 500 followers! I’m so happy for all the people who have shown their support and love for my gassy bots! It’s so amazing and I’d never think that this account would get so big! Love you all! 💚💚💚*
